user.title: Meridian Energy
user.description: Enter your Meridian account email. A one-time code will be emailed to you.

otp.title: Enter code
otp.description: Enter the one-time code Meridian just emailed to you.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate
reauth_confirm.description: Your login expired. Enter your email to receive a new code.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach Meridian. Try again.
error.invalid_auth: Could not start login for that email.
error.invalid_otp: That code was not accepted. Try again.

abort.wrong_account: The re-authenticated account does not match this entry. Remove and re-add the integration for the new account.

data.use_api_cost: Use Meridian's estimated costs (uncheck to use manual rates)
